conventions.description: A React project using TypeScript with modern best practices.
namingRules: Files for hooks use camelCase starting with 'use' (e.g., useAuth.ts)
userNotes: Use TypeScript interfaces/types for props and state
Follow React best practices for hooks and state management

additionalInfo.stateManagement: Redux Toolkit or Zustand (depending on app size)
additionalInfo.styling: Tailwind CSS with optional CSS modules
